text:
In the first image, I feel a sense of nervous anticipation. The mingling crowd, hushed voices, and my position on the edge of the gathering make me keenly aware of my outsider status. I wonder if I will find connection or understanding in this space, or remain an observer.

In the second image, surrounded by the bright, patterned display of ideas and research, I feel both curiosity and a familiar self-consciousness. The text on the screen reflects my own inner thoughts: awkwardness, a desire to be understood, the gulf between intention and perception. This space feels reflective and a bit vulnerable; I am caught between wanting to engage and fearing I might not fit in.
